name: Transocean Ltd.
business: Transocean Ltd. is a leading international provider of offshore contract drilling services for oil and gas wells. It contracts mobile offshore drilling rigs, related equipment, and work crews to drill oil and gas wells, specializing in ultra-deepwater and harsh environment drilling services.

exposures.sentence: Transocean Ltd. is a leading international provider of offshore contract drilling services for oil and gas wells.

Our automated fleet includes four ultra-deepwater drillships and five harsh environment semisubmersibles that are equipped with an automated drilling control system, and we have two more installations in progress.

Since 2022, we have three ultra-deepwater drillships that are equipped with an offshore robotics riser system that handles riser joint bolting without human intervention, and we have one more installation in progress.

At December 31, 2025, among other equity investments, we held noncontrolling equity ownership interests in Global Sea Mineral Resources NV, an unconsolidated Belgian company and leading developer of nodule collection technology, which is engaged in the development and exploration of deep-sea polymetallic nodules that contain metals critical to the growing renewable energy market.
We are subject to cybersecurity risks and threats as well as risks related to the use of artificial intelligence and the regulation of data privacy and security.

catalysts.event: Entry into Business Combination Agreement with Valaris
catalysts.sentence: On February 9, 2026, we and Valaris entered into a Business Combination Agreement (the "Agreement") providing for the Business Combination.
